1.name: Prof. Candice
1.text: I was late, but you somehow still managed to arrive after me...

3.name: Colin
3.text: * How'd he get here so quick... *

4.name: Prof. Candice
4.text: Anyway, as I've said last week, we will be having an assessment today.

5.name: Prof. Candice
5.text: If you listened to the last week's lecture, this would be a breeze!
